Journal.Title: Journal of the American Association of Nurse Practitioners

Article.ArticleTitle: FORTIFY: A nurse practitioner leadership framework for embedding organizational wellness as infrastructure.

Abstract.AbstractText: Workforce distress, burnout, and moral injury threaten the stability and sustainability of health systems. Nurse practitioners (NPs), trained in prevention, systems thinking, and holistic care, are uniquely positioned to reframe wellness as a leadership imperative rather than a reactive initiative. This article introduces the FORTIFY Framework, an evidence-informed model that embeds prevention, recovery, and accountability into daily operations. Rooted in trauma-informed leadership and positive psychology, FORTIFY equips NPs to integrate wellness into policy, education, and practice design. Elevating wellness to a professional standard affirms its foundational role in clinical excellence, workforce vitality, and the future of nursing leadership.
Abstract.CopyrightInformation: Copyright © 2026 American Association of Nurse Practitioners.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Psychiatric Mental Health Nurse Practitioner and Wellness Strategist with cross-sector experience in public service, education, and organizational wellness, Wellness Takes Fortitude PLLC, Washington, DC.
